system.description:
I didn't hear no bell.

– Rocky Balboa, Rocky V

Brawlers of determination and swagger. An ascetic may dedicate themselves to a single-focused blow, but a pugilist will break their fingers and keep punching with the bloody stump.

Iconic Pugilists

  • Carl, Dungeon Crawler Carl series
  • Rocky Balboa, Rocky series
  • Hellboy, Hellboy
  • Stiffener Medick, Redwall
  • Tifa Lockhart, Final Fantasy VII

Playing Pugilist

Pugilists are frontline bruisers. Stay in the frontline, even while at low HP.

Action: Attack (Brawl)
Move: Frontline
Starting Pack: Brawler or Monk
Key Stat: Might
Complexity: ★★★☆☆

Training

Weapons: –
Skills: Brawl, and 3 from either Detect, Finesse, Influence, Medicine, or Sneak

Class Features

Level

Features

1st

Fisticuffs, Rope-a-Dope

2nd

Beat Rush

3rd

Perk

4th

Prowess

5th

Perk

6th

Haymaker

7th

Perk

8th

Impact

9th

Perk

10th

Hard Knocks

levelFeatures.name: Fisticuffs
levelFeatures.description:
While only using Brawl Weapons, you can use a d4 if the damage was previously lower and, once per Round, you can spend half your Speed to make a second attack rather than skip your Move.

Additionally, if you have Favor on a Brawl Attack Check and hit a Target you could viably Grapple or Shove, you can choose to Grapple or Shove them.

levelFeatures.name: Rope-a-Dope
levelFeatures.description: You gain the Check Hook Perk (p. 67) and can make two attacks with it, rather than one.

levelFeatures.name: Beat Rush
levelFeatures.description: If you take the Rush Action, you can also make one attack with a Brawl Weapon that Action.

levelFeatures.name: Perk
levelFeatures.description: Choose a new Perk. You must meet the prerequisites to take it, unless the Perk is granted through a Class Feature.

levelFeatures.name: Prowess
levelFeatures.description: If you pass a Save to Block, you ignore two of the highest rolled damage dice, rather than one.

levelFeatures.name: Perk
levelFeatures.description: Choose a new Perk. You must meet the prerequisites to take it, unless the Perk is granted through a Class Feature.

levelFeatures.name: Haymaker
levelFeatures.description: If you pass a Brawl Attack Check by 10 or more, the Target is Dazed until your next Turn. When you become a 10th Level Pugilist, it triggers if you roll 8 or more.

levelFeatures.name: Perk
levelFeatures.description: Choose a new Perk. You must meet the prerequisites to take it, unless the Perk is granted through a Class Feature.

levelFeatures.name: Impact
levelFeatures.description: You use a d6 for the damage die of your Brawl weapons.

levelFeatures.name: Perk
levelFeatures.description: Choose a new Perk. You must meet the prerequisites to take it, unless the Perk is granted through a Class Feature.

levelFeatures.name: Haymaker (8+)
levelFeatures.description: Your Haymaker Feature now triggers if you roll 8 or more, rather than 10 or more.
